scripts.predev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pidOn3000 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if (-not $pidOn3000) { Write-Host 'Port 3000 is free.'; exit 0 }; $proc = Get-Process -Id $pidOn3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($proc -and $proc.ProcessName -eq 'node') { Stop-Process -Id $pidOn3000 -Force; Write-Host 'Stopped Node on port 3000.' } else { Write-Host 'Port 3000 is in use by a non-Node process. Leaving it untouched.' }"
